purpose: Record PR-132 C-rank recheck for KRA / South Korea. This file is not a calendar input.

source_rechecks.result: Official KRA race site route was checked, but captured text did not expose complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows.

checked_terms: KRA 2026 June racing schedule Seoul Busan Jeju official
Korea Racing Authority race calendar 2026 June
source_rechecks.result: Follow-up search did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table for Seoul, Busan-Gyeongnam, and Jeju.

promotion_status.reason: KRA is not promoted to C-rank manual records because no captured official route currently provides complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows. Normal Seoul / Busan-Gyeongnam / Jeju racing patterns are not enough.

regeneration_method.current: Re-check KRA race site and KRA notice/home routes, including Korean-language monthly or annual race-date files.
regeneration_method.missing_for_promotion: A no-login KRA monthly calendar endpoint, annual implementation plan, downloadable race-date PDF, or accepted official source that exposes June 2026 dates and racecourses.

next_update_steps: Search Korean-language KRA notices for annual or monthly race-date PDFs.
Inspect KRA monthly calendar endpoints or API calls with browser/devtools or Codex if normal capture remains insufficient.
Do not infer Seoul, Busan-Gyeongnam, or Jeju meeting dates from normal weekly race-day patterns.
Promote only after every row includes meeting_date, racecourse, source_url, parser, last_checked, and a documented regeneration method.
